title: 2 Pack Double Walled Glass Mug, Cappuccino Drinking Cups, Insulated Glass Coffee Cup with Handle, Perfect for Espresso, Latte, Espresso, Tea, Juice, Beverage (250ml/ 8.5oz)
features: DOUBLE WALLED DESIGN: These coffee cups enhance your enjoyment of a good hot coffee. The double walled design keep coffee nice and hot for a long time without feeling the heat in my hand. Also double wall and clear body create a floating illusion which makes your drinks more appealing.

TOP OF THE LINE QUALITY: These coffee mug are made of superior borosilicate glass, light and delicate but are extremely high quality, explosive-proof to high temperature, it allows you to fill boiling water into the frozen cup instantly, safe to heat in microwave.

HAND-BLOWN: Thanks to the high-quality workmanship and experience of the glassblowers, the glass mug is wonderfully light, clear and smooth for easy and pleasant use. The thick handle is comfortable to grasp.

VERSATILE COFFEE CUPS: The reusable double walled glass cups are perfect for coffee, latte, espresso, cappuccino, tea, milk, smoothie, and juice. Simple and flowing line, crystal clear glass make them be nice addition to the home, office, restaurant, pub, and so on.

IDEAL GIFT: Chic and stylish look make 2 pack of 8.5 oz/250ml mug a classy and practical gift for a spouse, friend, coworker, roommate, or family member on Birthday, Anniversary, Wedding shower, Valentine's Day.
description: Product Description Light Up A New Day with Dyserbuy Coffee Mug! Whether you're looking for a new addition to the glassware in your kitchen or are just looking for an beautiful, lightweight, double wall insulated glass set of mugs to hold your morning cup of coffee, these espresso cups are what you need. In addition, give your busy mom,friend a gift, they keeps the coffee hot for so long… perfect for whom always have something to do and forget to finish up their coffees. Enhance Your Drinking Experience We have taken the time to craft a drinking experience like no other. A special selection of the finest borosilicate glass mixed with the expertise of the greatest hand glass workers handcrafted each coffee cups. Be amazed at the smooth, premium feel of the glass.The surface is flawless--better to reflect the richness of the drink inside! Borosilicate Glass Microwave Safe Refrigerator Safety Choose Your Favorite Double Wall Glass Mug Perfect for Hot & Cold Drinks The double-lined glass mugs are the perfect choice for coffee, tea, mixed drinks and more. They keep the cup warm for longer time and you can hold it straight away without burning yourself. Borosilicate glass is a heat-resistant glass that is stronger and more resistant to temperature changes and scratching. 250ml Perfect Capacity Double-Walled Insulation Lightweight & Delicate Great Gift Ideal Multiple-Functions Volume in 250ml, these double insulated coffee cups with handle are suitable for hold hot & cold drink, cappuccino, latte, espresso, macchiato, tea, juice, iced beverages, or smoothies, you can use these glasses in any occasion, they are so perfect and charming. A Thoughtful Gift These set of 4 double wall glass coffee cups are packed with a homey gift package, it is an ideal gift choice for the persons you love or love you. Glass tea mug from Dyserbuy is always a good idea for any holiday and for any occasion. Easy to Clean & Store The latte glasses with a large opening are easy to hand wash with water and soap, elegant and lightweight, fitting easily into kitchen cabinets. if your mug develops a stain, baking soda is effective at removing it. Comfortable Handle They are made of durable borosilicate with a wide comfortable handle making them easy to hold. Smooth Cup Edges The smooth glass and edges have been polished thousands of times to make the glass smooth and beautiful. Mouth-Blown Glass Constructed out of lightweight blown borosilicate glass, is made with a ventilation hole, leak-proof and spill-proof. Double Walled Insulation Lightweight and delicate, double wall borosilicate glass cups, anti-scalding, better protect you from harm. Warm tips - After many experiments, we found that leaving a ventilation hole at the bottom can better reduce glass bursting during use. The gas in this small hole can only flow out, but water vapor cannot enter. - There will be minor differences between each product because of mouthblown and hand-finish craftsmanship. - Hand-washing is recommended.
